reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los playeros, son muy simpáticos. Muy bien asesorada por el chico que atiende en venta de repuestos. YPF ACA de Brown y Santa Fe.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants; they're very friendly. I received excellent advice from the guy who sells spare parts. YPF is located near Brown and Santa Fe.

reviews.comment:
Para ser una estación de servicio del ACA, esta funciona bastante mal. Había un solo playero trabajando, lo que supuso una espera prolongada. No andaba el sistema, por lo que no pude usar la app y gozar de sus descuentos asociados. Según el empleado,  hacía más de 5 días que estaban sin ese servicio!!!

(Translated by Google)
For an ACA service station, this one is pretty bad. There was only one attendant working, which meant a long wait. The system wasn't working, so I couldn't use the app and take advantage of the associated discounts. According to the employee, they hadn't had that service for over five days!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCZzh2NnJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Se arman largas filas para cargar combustible pero se despacha rápido. La atención siempre es muy buena.

(Translated by Google)
There are long lines to fill up, but they serve you quickly. The service is always very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdmJxdXpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace dos semanas pase a cargar comb. , por surtidores de Colón.  Después de hacer cola durante un rato largo , y recién al llegar a la posta de carga , el playero me dice ..  " la App no funciona "..... y le sonrió a sus compañeritos como disfrutándolo.

(Translated by Google)
Two weeks ago I went to fill up my tank at the Colón gas station. After waiting in line for a long time, and only when I finally got to the pump, the attendant told me... "the app isn't working"... and smiled at his colleagues as if he was enjoying it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCcGV5amN3EAE
